Stop.command: bash -c 'if [ -f ".claude/feature-roadmap.json" ] && git diff --name-only -- ".claude/feature-roadmap.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then git add .claude/feature-roadmap.json && git commit -m "docs(roadmap): update feature status" && echo "✅ feature-roadmap.json auto-committed"; fi'

bash -c 'DIR="myinsights"; CLAUDE="CLAUDE.md"; if [ -d "$DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then if ! grep -q "myinsights" "$CLAUDE" 2>/dev/null; then printf "
## Development Insights
Index: [myinsights/1nsights.md](myinsights/1nsights.md) — check here FIRST before debugging.
On error: grep the error string in the index, read only the matched detail file.
Capture new findings: /myinsights [title]
" >> "$CLAUDE"; git add "$CLAUDE"; echo "myinsights/ reference added to CLAUDE.md"; fi; git add "$DIR"; git commit -m "docs(insights): update knowledge base"; echo "✅ myinsights/ auto-committed"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -d "docs/plans" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "docs/plans" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "docs/plans" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then git add docs/plans && git commit -m "docs(plans): auto-commit implementation plans" && echo "✅ docs/plans/ auto-committed"; fi'
